projectDescription: An interactive visual storytelling website for Hainan University campus, combining galgame-style character illustrations with real campus locations through an envelope-opening ritual and interactive map experience.
keyFeatures: Envelope-opening ceremony animation (fire seal crack, cover flip, letter reveal)
Interactive campus map with story pins (PC desktop experience)
Mobile waterfall story feed with shared-element transitions
Creation board (/creation) - community-contributed ideas in masonry layout
Feishu (Lark) Bitable CMS integration for content management
Aliyun OSS image storage with MD5 deduplication
Admin panel with sync job orchestration, scheduler, and publish pipeline
Framer Motion animations with Lenis smooth scrolling
Dual-device strategy: PC (map scroll) vs Mobile (stamp album)
publicApiSurface: Story interface - id, characterId, characterName, avatarUrl, mainImageUrl, content, author, date, locationId
LocationPoint interface - id, name, x, y, stories[]
CreationIdea interface - id, cardId, content, author, submitter, images[], createdAt, tags
CreationCard interface - id, cardId, addIdeaUrl, entries[]
Contributor interface - id, name, role, message
GET /api/admin/sync/config - read sync configuration and runtime summary
POST /api/admin/sync/jobs - create a sync job (sync-data or sync-data-and-publish)
npm run sync - CLI entry for Feishu data synchronization
npm run build - production build (includes sync)
